Describe the element in the image below and suggest a token.

response.content: {"description":"A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a cylindrical champagne/satin-nickel metal body. The upper capsule section features a fine woven mesh grille in a darker silver tone. The body bears engraved text reading 'PHANTOM classic' and a serial number 'Nr. 1307', along with a circular logo emblem. The microphone is mounted in a silver spider-style shock mount with elastic suspension bands. A circular black pop filter with dual-mesh screens is attached via a gooseneck arm to the same stand. Overall finish is matte champagne gold-silver metal.","consistencyTag":"champagne-condenser-mic-phantom-classic","suggestedToken":"PHANTOM_CLASSIC_MIC"}
